name: Yi-1.5 34B
note: Continually pretrained on 500B extra high-quality tokens; separate 16K/32K-context chat checkpoints also released.
tpsNote: Q4 GGUF (~20GB) fits a 24GB card only with reduced context headroom; no verified llama.cpp 4090 tok/s figure found.

results.notes: Yi-1.5-34B-32K base model, Open LLM Leaderboard v2

Yi-1.5-34B-32K variant, Open LLM Leaderboard v2. IFEval 'Inst-and-Prompt Level Strict Acc' (average of prompt-level strict 25.32% and inst-level strict 37.05%), the standard v2 leaderboard convention.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via GitHub repo and web search: Yi-1.5 series (34B/9B/6B) open-sourced May 13, 2024, Apache 2.0, continually pretrained on 500B extra tokens with 4K/16K/32K context variants. Confirmed all 5 Open LLM Leaderboard v2 scores (mmlu-pro 47.1, bbh 59.8, arc-challenge 66.3, gpqa 36.3, math-hard 13.4) verbatim on the linked HF dataset page (evaluated 2024-06-17, for Yi-1.5-34B-32K variant as noted). paramsB 34.4 approximated from HF (34B nominal); exact figure not independently pinned down beyond 'B' rounding but consistent across sources. No score changes made.
